goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Product state-overwrite defect: blur sends an empty patch that can read stale 150, and an older product preview can overwrite a newer 120 edit. The API correctly echoes requested quantity and FEFO. Pass live blur values and apply only the latest response matching current product/quantity/unit.

worker_package.objective: Repair only CookingMode request/state ordering, then complete every final gate.
verify: Pass live quantity/unit on blur; guard preview responses by latest request and current line triplet.
Run scoped/type/build, unchanged cooking E2E, full gates, three protected E2Es, disposable DB, live PID/port/hash/diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Older response can overwrite newer state or live/shared/protected/unrelated state touched.

evidence: Controlled onChange writes 120 but blur sends empty patch.
Unawaited selection preview can race edit.

parallel_safety.rationale: One state/request boundary and serial verification.
